raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 3, "R1.3": 4, "R1.6": 4, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix.",
    "R1.3": "Flags at least one claim the evidence does not support and provides specific critiques.",
    "R1.6": "Improves a few problem paragraphs by suggesting structural reorganization and reducing first-person narration.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the comparative accuracy without concrete numbers.",
    "RX.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure suggestions, though not explicitly verified.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content but notes that comprehensive evaluation is lacking.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not, as no specific changes were made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix.
rationale.R1.3: Flags at least one claim the evidence does not support and provides specific critiques.
rationale.R1.6: Improves a few problem paragraphs by suggesting structural reorganization and reducing first-person narration.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the comparative accuracy without concrete numbers.
rationale.RX.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure suggestions, though not explicitly verified.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content but notes that comprehensive evaluation is lacking.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not, as no specific changes were made.
